stars.description: A CLI to estimate inference memory requirements for Hugging Face models, written in Python.
stars.highlights: This CLI tool provides memory estimation for Hugging Face model inference, helping developers plan resource allocation. It supports GGUF and SafeTensors formats, offering practical insights for deployment.
stars.worthReading: It addresses a common pain point in model deployment by giving concrete memory requirements before running inference.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness: Young repo (903 stars) gaining traction with recent star from notable AI leader; Relevance: Directly addresses practical LLM infrastructure (model memory estimation); Concreteness: Concrete CLI tool with specific functionality for Hugging Face models.
